notes: Smoke records current multi-tab surface only; it does not intentionally perform conflicting edits.
Both tabs opened against the same browser context so IndexedDB/local storage are shared.
Absence of a visible lock/read-only/conflict warning matches the Phase 0 inventory risk that multi-tab overwrite behavior lacks protection.
